checkpoints.summary: Implemented user registration: domain models (UserAccount, Actor, EmailConfirmation, User) with validation, DTOs (UserCreate/Update/Response, RegistrationRequest/Response), ORM model (UserORM), repository impl (SQLAlchemyUserRepository), service (UserServiceImpl with register/get/update/delete), and API router (POST /users/register, GET/PUT/DELETE /users/{id}). 12/12 tests passing.
